data.title: Nanoveu Limited to Showcase AI-Driven Solutions at Embedded World 2025
data.description:
Nanoveu Ltd. ( (AU:NVU) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Nanoveu Limited has announced its participation in the Embedded World 2025 Conference & Exhibition in Nuremberg, Germany, highlighting its focus on AI-driven edge semiconductor solutions. This participation underscores Nanoveu’s strategic positioning in the 3D content, AI, and edge computing markets, potentially enhancing its industry influence and offering stakeholders insight into its growth trajectory.

More about Nanoveu Ltd.

Nanoveu Limited is a technology company specializing in advanced systems-on-chip (SoC) solutions, enabling ultra-low-power, AI-driven processing for smart devices, IoT applications, and 3D content transformation. Its product portfolio includes the EyeFly3D™ platform for glasses-free 3D experiences and Nanoshield™, a self-disinfecting film with antiviral and antimicrobial properties.

data.title: Legacy Iron Ore Partners with Bain Global Resources for Mt. Celia Gold Project
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Legacy Iron Ore Ltd ( (AU:LCY) ).

Legacy Iron Ore Ltd has entered into a Right to Mine Agreement with Bain Global Resources for the Mt. Celia gold mining operations. Under this agreement, Bain Global Resources will finance up to $10 million of mining activities, with profits shared between the two companies. Initially, Legacy will receive 75% of the net profits until it recovers $20 million, after which profits will be split equally. This strategic partnership is expected to enhance operational efficiencies and extend the operational life of the Mt. Celia project, leveraging high gold prices to maximize the mine’s potential and shareholder value.

More about Legacy Iron Ore Ltd

Legacy Iron Ore Ltd is a Western Australian-based company focused on the development and discovery of iron ore, base metals, tungsten, and gold. The company aims to increase shareholder wealth through the discovery, development, and operation of profitable mining assets. Legacy Iron was listed on the Australian Securities Exchange in 2008 and has several key projects, including the Mt Bevan Iron Ore Project and the South Laverton Gold Project.

Average Trading Volume: 497,859

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$99.17M

data.title: Director’s Increased Stake in National Storage REIT
data.description:
National Storage REIT ( (AU:NSR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

National Storage REIT announced a change in the director’s interest, with Director Inmaculada Concepcion Beaumont acquiring an additional 10,000 fully paid ordinary stapled securities, bringing the total to 47,449. This acquisition indicates a strengthened position for the director within the company, potentially impacting stakeholder confidence and the company’s market perception positively.

More about National Storage REIT

National Storage REIT is a company that operates in the real estate investment trust sector, focusing on storage solutions. It comprises National Storage Holdings Limited and National Storage Property Trust, providing storage services to a diverse market.

data.description:
Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited ( (AU:NEU) ) has shared an update.

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced an update on its ongoing share buy-back program, with a total of 78,353 securities bought back on the previous day, adding to the cumulative total of 1,151,796 securities repurchased. This buy-back initiative reflects the company’s strategic efforts to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

data.title: News Corporation Announces Cessation of Class B Securities
data.description:
News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh ( (AU:NWS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

News Corporation has announced the cessation of 32,535 Class B common stock securities due to a buy-back cancellation, effective March 7, 2025. This move may impact the company’s capital structure and could be part of a broader strategy to optimize shareholder value or adjust its financial strategies.

News Corporation is a diversified media and information services company. It operates in various segments including news and information services, book publishing, digital real estate services, and subscription video services, with a focus on delivering content to a global audience.

data.title: Deep Value Driller AS Insider Increases Stake
data.description:

Einar J. Greve, chair of the board of directors and primary insider of Deep Value Driller AS, has acquired 97,931 shares in the company through Cipriano AS at an average price of NOK 12.4927 per share. data.title: EEII AG Announces Board Reorganization to Enhance Governance
data.description:
EEII AG ( (CH:EEII) ) has provided an announcement.

EEII AG, a company listed on the Swiss Exchange, has announced a reorganization of its Board of Directors to enhance corporate governance by separating the roles of CEO and Chairman. Christian Lüscher has been appointed as the new Chairman, while Alexandre Uldry will continue as CEO. The board has been reduced from seven to three members, potentially streamlining decision-making and improving efficiency.

data.title: Lokotech Advances to Mass Production of Scrypt ASIC Miners Amid Strong Market Demand
data.description:
Harmonychain AS ( (DE:7EW) ) has shared an update.

Lokotech, a subsidiary of Harmonychain AS, is transitioning to mass production of its Scrypt ASIC miner, marking a significant milestone after years of development. The company has secured substantial pre-orders and framework agreements, positioning itself strongly in the $1.4 billion Scrypt mining market. To support this growth, Lokotech has launched a partially underwritten rights issue to raise capital, ensuring financial stability and rewarding shareholders with tradable subscription rights and bonus warrants. This strategic move is expected to drive exceptional growth in 2025 and beyond, reinforcing Lokotech’s competitive edge in the semiconductor industry.

More about Harmonychain AS

Harmonychain AS operates in the semiconductor industry, focusing on developing advanced ASIC technology for cryptocurrency mining. The company is particularly known for its Scrypt ASIC miners, which are designed to offer superior speed and energy efficiency, targeting a rapidly growing market segment.

data.title: New Horizon Health Appoints Dr. Wang Yang as Independent Director
data.description:
New Horizon Health Limited ( (HK:6606) ) has shared an update.

New Horizon Health Limited has announced the appointment of Dr. Wang Yang as an independent non-executive director and a member of its audit committee, effective March 10, 2025. This move is part of the company’s efforts to comply with Rule 3.21 of the Listing Rules. Dr. Wang brings extensive experience in compliance and risk control, having held significant positions in various financial institutions. His appointment is expected to strengthen the company’s governance and compliance framework, potentially enhancing its market position and stakeholder confidence.

More about New Horizon Health Limited

data.title: AIM Vaccine Secures Approval for Advanced Rabies Vaccine, Bolstering Global Market Position
data.description:
An update from AIM Vaccine Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6660) ) is now available.

AIM Vaccine Co., Ltd. has received approval from the National Medical Products Administration for its innovative human diploid rabies vaccine, marking a significant technological advancement in the global rabies vaccine industry. This new vaccine offers higher efficacy and safety compared to existing options, and its approval is expected to strengthen AIM Vaccine’s leadership position in the market, enhancing its ability to provide high-quality rabies vaccines globally.

More about AIM Vaccine Co., Ltd. Class H

AIM Vaccine Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the pharmaceutical industry. The company focuses on developing and producing vaccines, with a significant emphasis on rabies vaccines, positioning itself as the world’s second-largest supplier in this niche market.
